assertions.notes: BFF emits { occurred_at, rank, result, match_id } per entry — rank_class and rank_level are NOT emitted on the wire. The SPA uses parseRankString() (after the fix from PR #2910) to derive class+level from the flat rank string. Before the fix the SPA called rankToNumeric(point.rank_class, point.rank_level) which were both undefined, producing an all-zero flat chart. The seeded test-data.sql rank_history has 5 entries (Gold 1-3 constructed, Diamond 1-2 limited). A missing-field bug would render rank-chart-empty or a flat zero series.
